message.content:
In the project at /home/antonypeter/Projects/crevia/creviamvp, please read these two files in full and report their contents concisely:

1. /home/antonypeter/Projects/crevia/creviamvp/src/pages/ResetPassword.tsx — the full component
2. /home/antonypeter/Projects/crevia/creviamvp/src/pages/Auth.tsx — only the sign-in error handling block (the `else` branch of `if (isSignup)` inside `handleAuth`, roughly lines 236–260) and the toast import/usage

I need to understand:
- How the password reset page works after the user clicks the reset link in their email
- The exact error messages shown for sign-in failures
- Whether there is any existing logic to detect "this account uses a different provider (Google)"

Report the exact code, keep under 300 words.

content.text: I'll read both files to extract the information you need.
